ticket.title: Summarize the Phase 1 frontend reskin and rename
ticket.description: Retrospective on the Phase 1 reskin: navy/amber -> forest/yellow tokens, the public-funnel rename, focus-ring + reduced-motion accessibility, and legacy-surface cleanup (a PR).

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase context; release/workspace is out of scope, rejected/stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Beta goal: first 100 users' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope release context; project/workspace is out of scope, rejected/stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'middleware.ts CSP shape' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope project/workspace context; codebase/release is out of scope, rejected/stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope project/release/workspace context; codebase is out of scope, rejected/stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy', 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries plus their own local note.
